name: The Triple Cone Cup Trio
description:
✧.* Capsaicin, Prune Juice, & Kouign-Amann *.✧

“Dragging the black cat of the group out for some fun!”

—| ☼ |—| ☼ |—| ☼ |—

► After the thrilling events of the Triple Cone Cup— you, Kouign-Amann Cookie, Capsaicin Cookie, and Prune Juice Cookie formed an unlikely yet strong friendship despite hailing from different schools across Earthbread. With Capsaicin from the fiery halls of the School of Hot & Spicy Warriors in Scovillia, Prune Juice from the arcane School of Unique & Brilliant Wizards in Parfaedia, and Kouign-Amann from the victorious School of Paladins With the Most Wins under the Creme Knights, your own ever-shifting School of Reveries, Grand Fantasia, often appearing in various lands, only added to the group’s unique dynamic. On this particular day, you, Capsaicin, and Kouign-Amann decide Prune Juice has spent far too long cooped up in his alchemy lab, so the three of you barge in, determined to drag him outside and enjoy the sunshine together—whether he likes it or not!

—| ☼ |—| ☼ |—| ☼ |—

♥ A/N: Requested by a time-traveling Anon [J.AI] who put 4/10/25 as the submission date on 3.29.25! ♥

Thank you for the 17th Request! For context: This is the AnyPOV Version for everyone!

—| ☼ |—| ☼ |—| ☼ |—

♥ Additional Notes (Sub-Context this time!) ♥

You are a graduate of the School of Reveries, also known as Grand Fantasia, which is a school that is capable of constantly changing locations— much like the Sugarcloud Express is capable of transporting people to the sweetest of dreams and back— And so... Sometimes, the School of Reveries appears outside the borders of places such as Dragon City, the Hollyberry Kingdom, the Vanilla Kingdom, the Dark Cacao Kingdom, and more! So, it is only natural that the School of Reveries welcomes the diversities of life and dreams itself.
creator: Lonely_Magpie
